---
title: "Chapter 13: Using Agency Records"
description: "Chapter-level study notes for Handbook of Practical Program Evaluation."
book_id: "handbook-practical-program-evaluation"
collection_id: "evaluation-texts"
note_type: "Chapter"
chapter_number: 13
source_pages: "369-388"
citation_key: "newcomer_hatry_wholey_2015_handbook_practical_program_evaluation"
evidence_ids:
  - "chunk:handbook-practical-program-evaluation:ch13-chapter-13-using-agency-records:c0001"
  - "chunk:handbook-practical-program-evaluation:part-2:c0001"
source_status: "needs_review"
---

# Chapter 13: Using Agency Records

<div class="chapter-meta"><span>369-388</span><span>Part 2: Practical Data Collection Procedures</span><span>Source status: needs_review</span></div>

## Core Claim

Agency and administrative records are common evaluation data sources, but access, definitions, missingness, and quality must be assessed.

## Summary

The chapter treats agency records as attractive but risky: they can provide counts, service histories, and outcomes, yet may be incomplete or inconsistently defined.

Evaluators need to understand how records were created, why fields exist, and whether data elements mean the same thing across units and time.

Administrative data become useful only when quality checks, access agreements, confidentiality, and documentation are handled carefully.

## Key Concepts

- **administrative data**: Existing agency, archival, or management records used as evaluation evidence.
- **data collection plan**: The operational plan linking evaluation questions to information sources, instruments, fieldwork, and staffing.
- **performance measurement**: Ongoing monitoring of indicators to support accountability and improvement.

## Practice Implications

- Audit record definitions before analysis.
- Check missingness and comparability across sites or time.
- Negotiate access and confidentiality early.

## Source Records

- `chunk:handbook-practical-program-evaluation:ch13-chapter-13-using-agency-records:c0001`
- `chunk:handbook-practical-program-evaluation:part-2:c0001`

## References

These notes summarise source-linked records from *Handbook of Practical Program Evaluation* [@newcomer_hatry_wholey_2015_handbook_practical_program_evaluation].
